detail.description:
Hole Stars – Scoop, Solve, and Shine

Looking for a game that’s fun, fast, and totally satisfying? Meet Hole Stars — a relaxing puzzle game where you guide a growing black hole through colorful levels, collect everything in sight, and beat the clock in style.

From tiny objects to giant surprises, every level is packed with items to collect, puzzles to solve, and obstacles to outsmart. Whether you’re in it for the challenge or the relaxing vibes, Hole Stars is the perfect break-time pick-me-up.
